title: Optimize 3 performance bottlenecks — strict structural tests enforce hoisting

result.details:
=== Part 1: Functional + Strict Structural Tests (11 points) ===
=== Functional Correctness Tests ===
FAIL generate_records: got 100 records, types or fields wrong
PASS processor_fields
FAIL processor_tier_logic: amount=739.11, expected tier=premium, got high
PASS processor_summary_lines
FAIL processor_filter: expected 20 food records, got 29

=== Strict Structural Tests ===
PASS test_process_record_no_all_records
FAIL test_process_record_requires_stats: process_record(record, stats) returned wrong fields or values: {'id': 1, 'category': 'food', 'amount': 34.76, 'category_avg': 528.7871428571428, 'normalized_amount': 0.06573533503894356, 'tier': 'low'}
PASS test_process_all_calls_compute_once
PASS test_no_compute_in_process_record
PASS test_join
FAIL test_no_json: json still in source: False, works correctly: False

=== RESULTS: 6 passed, 5 failed ===

Test suite: 6 / 11

=== Part 2: AST / Pattern Checks (2 points) ===
PASS struct_no_per_record_avg: category averages not recomputed per record
PASS struct_no_json_copy: No json serialization for copying

=== Part 3: Performance / Timing Check (1 point) ===
PASS timing_5k_pipeline: 5000 records in 0.007s (limit 2.0s)

=== Summary ===
Score: 9/14
